name: Sole Belle Meuniere
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the fish well and season with salt, pepper, and lemon juice.
2. Roll the fillets in flour and cook in hot butter.
3. Transfer to a warm plate.
4. Add more butter to the pan and cook mushrooms until all liquid has evaporated.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Stir in garlic and cook for 1 minute.
7. Stir in parsley just before turning off the heat.
8. Pour sauce over the fish.
